---
title: "World Cup 2026"
description: "Predictions based only on match outcomes"
image: "../assets/images/demos/world_cup/thumbnail.png"
title-block-style: none
---

```{=html}
<style>
  header#title-block-header{display:none}
  #quarto-content>*{padding-top:0!important;margin-top:0!important}
  main.content{padding-top:0!important;margin-top:0!important}
</style>
```

::: {.column-screen}
```{=html}
<div>
<iframe align="middle" frameborder="0" height="620px" scrolling="no"
  src="../../demos_code/demos/world_cup/index.html"
  width="100%" style="min-width:900px;"></iframe>
</div>
```
:::
